subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-10-24 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: ...in every dispensation three persons are mentioned. In the Mosaic dispensation there was Jehovah, the burning bush and Moses.
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the cross and the trinity, @presence of; reunion with God, @The Holy Spirit, @angels
